reasoning_model_1: The model accurately reproduces the script '别担心，一切都会好起来的。' without any errors or hallucinations. Regarding the core paralinguistic feature '音高' (Pitch), the model successfully adopts a deep, low-frequency male voice. The delivery is breathy and resonant, effectively conveying the 'low pitch' (低音) requirement specified in the prompt. The tone is comforting and natural, fitting the semantic context of the sentence perfectly.
reasoning_model_2: The model fails significantly in both content accuracy and feature control. Firstly, regarding content, it reads the target sentence '别担心，一切都会好起来的' but then continues to read a long, hallucinated description ('声音沉稳如大地回响...') which was not part of the requested script. Secondly, regarding the '音高' (Pitch) requirement, the voice generated is a high-pitched, bright female/youthful voice, which is the exact opposite of the requested 'low pitch' (低音). The audio is energetic rather than deep or calm.
model_comparison: Model 1 followed all instructions perfectly: the content matches the script exactly, and the pitch is distinctively low and deep as requested. Model 2 failed on multiple levels: it hallucinated a significant amount of text (likely reading prompt descriptions) and used a high-pitched voice instead of the requested low pitch. Therefore, Model 1 is the clear winner.
